title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Environment, Natural Resources to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to facilitate climate resiliency.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, July 1, 2026 -- The committee on Environment and Natural Resources, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 560) of Brendan P. Crighton for legislation to facilitate climate resiliency, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 3156).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Environment and Natural Resources
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
